Test Case Name: TC01_Verify Exposure Amount Auto-Population with Turnover Exposure Base_Casualty_New Business_AC1
Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that when a user creates a new business transaction for Casualty LOB with Turnover as exposure base
Action: the exposure amount is automatically populated in the Claims tab of Risk Analysis screen
Expected Result: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Test Repository Path: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Domestic submission with Casualty LOB and effective date as release date
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a submission successfully with Casualty product selected

Action: 3. Navigate to Casualty screen and select NAICS codes for Canada location
Expected Result: 3. User should be able to view Casualty screen with NAICS code selection options for Canada

Action: 4. Select Turnover as exposure base for selected NAICS code with value 100,000 CAD
Expected Result: 4. User should be able to select Turnover and enter exposure value successfully

Action: 5. Navigate to Risk Analysis screen and click on Claims tab
Expected Result: 5. User should be able to view Claims tab under Risk Analysis screen

Action: 6. Verify Exposure Amount field is automatically populated with 100,000
Expected Result: 6. User should see the exposure amount field populated with the sum of 100,000 (same as Turnover exposure value provided)

Action: 7. Verify Exposure Amount field is enabled and displays currency (CAD)
Expected Result: 7. User should verify the exposure amount displays with proper currency formatting
